events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Today, we're celebrating the 86th birthday of legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From the Cavern Club to global superstardom, his drumming defined a generation. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on the sticks?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May! The Queen guitarist and astrophysicist continues to rock the world. What's your all-time favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 today? The Rolling Stones legend is still bringing the moves. What's your top Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with its first video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever... with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first video! A truly iconic moment.

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop was never the same again. What's your favourite track from this iconic album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people descended on a farm in New York for three days of peace, love, and music. Happy Anniversary, Woodstock!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977 at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years ago today, the music world lost an icon. Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur shooting
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, tragically passing away a week later.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years since the tragic shooting in Las Vegas. Remembering the incredible talent and impact of Tupac Shakur. His music continues to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix in 1970, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Legendary Guitarist
angles.copy: 56 years ago today, we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His influence on guitar music is still felt across generations. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', an album that continues to inspire. That zebra crossing photo is still instantly recognisable! What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 75th Birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders shaped so much. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Today, we're celebrating the 54th birthday of the one and only Liam Gallagher.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the legendary Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Oasis or solo Liam track?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine', a song that still resonates globally with its message of peace and unity. Truly a masterpiece.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: 1000 Songs in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. Remember the sheer magic of having '1,000 songs in your pocket'? It truly changed everything.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic 007 film franchise which began with 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to unforgettable villains, what's your favourite 007 moment or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
